title: theme-atoms v1 atom
description: A discrete theming primitive — a separator style, glyph set, prompt segment spec, role binding, or syntax scheme. Atoms are referenced by theme compositions but are independently versioned and typed.

schema.description: Pin the schema URI so consumers can verify they understand this version.

type.description: Atom type. Maps to ATOMS.yml atom_types.

id.description: Stable namespaced ID — e.g. theme-atoms/separator-style/powerline. Never changes after first publish.

version.description: Semver. Bump on any content change.

description.description: One-sentence description of what this atom provides.

surface.description: Surface this atom targets. 'any' means surface-agnostic.

content.description: The literal primitive value — e.g. the separator character(s), the glyph string, the role map expression. Interpretation depends on 'type'.
